statements.__comment__: DEPRECATED: temporary backward-compatibility migration. Earlier versions scoped GitHubBranchProtectionRule cleanup via HAS_RULE (per-repo); the schema now uses RESOURCE from GitHubOrganization as the sub_resource. Backfill the RESOURCE edge for every existing rule reachable from the currently-syncing GitHubOrganization via its repositories. Scoped by $owner_org_id so multi-org refreshes don't redo the full graph each time. Idempotent (MERGE). Remove in v1.0.0.
statements.query: MATCH (o:GitHubOrganization {id: $owner_org_id})-[:RESOURCE]->(r:GitHubRepository)-[:HAS_RULE]->(rule:GitHubBranchProtectionRule) MERGE (o)-[rel:RESOURCE]->(rule) ON CREATE SET rel.lastupdated = rule.lastupdated
